JavaScript errors — which can include form values, URL params, and DOM content — are transmitted to Adobe-controlled infrastructure, not the site operator's. Confirmed across multiple Marketo customer sites

pixel.instantly.ai.note: AI cold email platform — enables mass cold email campaigns with invisible tracking pixels. Can send thousands of tracked emails per day to recipients who never opted in.

pixel.lemlist.com.note: Cold email outreach platform — tracks opens, clicks, and engagement of unsolicited sales emails. Recipients never opted in to receive these emails, let alone to be tracked.

pixel.mailtrack.io.note: Email read receipt tracker — embeds invisible tracking pixels in emails to report when recipients open them, from what device, location, and how many times. Recipients never consent to being tracked.

pixel.outreach.io.note: Sales engagement platform — tracks every email open, link click, and reply with per-recipient analytics. Senders see exactly when, where, and on what device emails are read.

pixel.salesloft.com.note: Sales engagement platform — embeds invisible pixels in sales emails to track opens, clicks, and engagement timing. Creates detailed recipient activity timelines without consent.

pixel.woodpecker.co.note: B2B cold email tool — tracks email opens and clicks in automated follow-up sequences sent to prospects who never consented to receive or be tracked by these emails

r.selligent.com.note: Selligent (now Marigold) email tracking redirect and pixel domain

r.us-east-1.awstrack.me.note: Amazon SES email open and click tracking pixel domain

sdk.braze.com.note: Customer engagement platform — sends push, email, SMS, and in-app messages based on behavioral triggers

ssl.gstatic.com/ui/v1/icons/mail.note: Gmail proxies external images through its servers, partially masking tracker IPs, but still enables open tracking through the proxy request timing

subscribe.ft.com.note: Financial Times subscription marketing — tracks reader engagement for paywall optimization and B2B subscription targeting

subscribe.wsj.com.note: Wall Street Journal subscription marketing — uses article reading patterns for subscription propensity scoring and offer targeting

subscription.washingtonpost.com.note: Washington Post subscription marketing — Amazon-owned publisher using engagement data for subscription conversion optimization

t.boomeranggmail.com.note: Email productivity tool with read receipt tracking — tracks when recipients open emails and from what location, sold as email scheduling feature

t.emailtracking.com.note: Generic email tracking pixel domain — used by multiple services to embed invisible 1x1 pixel images in emails that phone home when opened, revealing IP, device, and timing data

t.reply.io.note: Sales engagement platform — tracks cold email opens and engagement with AI-powered follow-up sequences, tracking recipients who never consented to any communication

t.streak.com.note: CRM built into Gmail with invisible email tracking — reports read receipts, link clicks, and location data back to senders without recipient awareness or consent

t.superhuman.com.note: Email client with built-in read receipt tracking — embeds invisible pixels that reveal recipient location, device, and open count. Sparked major controversy as recipients cannot opt out. Disables tracking only after public backlash.

track.customer.io.note: Behavioral messaging platform — tracks web and app activity for automated email, SMS, and push message triggers

track.mailerlite.com.note: MailerLite email open and click tracking pixel domain

track.mixmax.com.note: Sales engagement platform — tracks email opens, link clicks, and attachment downloads. Embeds tracking pixels that reveal recipient behavior without consent.

tracking.getdrip.com.note: Drip email marketing tracking pixel and click tracking domain

traffic.megaphone.fm.note: Podcast hosting platform with dynamic ad insertion — replaces pre-roll and mid-roll ads in real-time based on listener data

trk.klclick.com.note: Klaviyo email link click tracking domain

updraftplus.com.note: UpdraftPlus WordPress backup plugin phones home for update checks

wpforms.com.note: WPForms WordPress plugin telemetry and license validation

wpml.org.note: WordPress multilingual plugin — phones home for license validation and translation memory sync

yoast.com.note: Yoast SEO WordPress plugin telemetry and update check endpoint
